title: Dice-Blocks by Limo4317
description: There are just blocks here, one for each of the numbers 1 to 6. And then you can simply build a dice machine with a redstone mechanism.
body:
# **Welcome to Dice-Blocks** #

After spending ten minutes searching in vain for a mod that simply adds a block for every number from 1 - 6,   
I just made it myself.

This mod adds 6 dice blocks and their crafting recipes, so you can easily build a redstone mechanism that works like dice rolling in real life and looks good.

There are also two blocks called Black Dice and White Dice. They are normal dice with all 6 numbers.
Credits for these two go to my friend **_NXDrystanThor_**!
I hope you'll have fun with it ;)

I made this Mod with **[MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)**!

**Report Issues on my [Discord](https://discord.gg/mZD8FnCJNc)!**
